summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agency Success Automation feature. All 24 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all 6 tabs (Overview, Onboarding, KPIs, Contracts, Bookings, Forecast) working. Create modals for Onboarding, Contracts, and Bookings all functional with proper backend integration. Revenue forecasting displays predictions with confidence levels and breakdowns.
critical_code_review_comments: All Agency Automation endpoints properly return data from MongoDB
Onboarding workflows include 8 default steps with proper status tracking
Contract management supports multiple contract types with clause generation
Booking management calculates fees, commissions, and talent payouts correctly
KPI dashboard aggregates metrics across revenue, bookings, talent, and clients
Revenue forecasting generates predictions with confidence intervals and breakdowns by booking type
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_agency_success_automation.py - Created comprehensive test suite with 24 tests
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API tests: 5+ onboarding workflows, 5+ contracts, 5+ bookings with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency Success Automation is fully functional. Access via /agency-automation route after login. Features tested: health check, onboarding workflows (create, list, stats), contracts (create, list, stats), bookings (create, list, stats), KPI dashboard (month/quarter/year periods), revenue forecast (monthly/quarterly/yearly), alerts, and dashboard summary. All CRUD operations verified with Create→GET pattern. Frontend tabs all working with proper data display and create modals.

booking_management.test_get_booking_stats: PASS - Returns stats with total, confirmed, pending, revenue counts

revenue_forecast.test_get_monthly_forecast: PASS - Returns forecast with confidence level and bounds

dashboard.test_get_automation_dashboard: PASS - Returns comprehensive dashboard with all stats

crud_workflows.test_booking_create_and_verify: PASS - Create and verify via list
